description: Pinned public Hugging Face corpora used by CI to run middens analyze/export without LLM interpretation.

corpora.description: Small mixed-source sanity cohort: Claude Code, Codex, and Pi coding-agent sessions.
corpora.notes: Tiny by design; useful for parser mix and fast PR checks. HSMM alone has insufficient data, but full analyze should still complete with insufficient summaries where appropriate.
Primary public Pi corpus used in the fixed HF HSMM replication.

corpora.description: Independent public Pi coding-agent project corpus.
corpora.notes: Good medium-sized non-pi-mono corpus; independent HSMM lift was 7.86x under current middens.

corpora.description: Independent public Pi coding-agent corpus with different HSMM magnitude than badlogicgames/pi-mono.
corpora.notes: Included because it varies materially from pi-mono; independent HSMM lift was 1.44x under current middens.

corpora.description: Claude-Code-style JSONL trace corpus from the public claude-code search candidates.
Claude API request/response trace rows; not yet suitable for middens analyze over raw JSONL corpus directories.
corpora.notes: Kept in registry as a known public corpus candidate, but excluded from analyze CI until the Parquet-to-session normalizer is promoted into the analyze path.

corpora.description: SWE-chat real-world coding-agent corpus with transcripts plus session/repository/commit Parquet tables.
corpora.notes: Excellent candidate for public-HF regression/analysis once access is granted, but the dataset is gated (`gated=auto`). Unauthenticated download of `transcripts/*.jsonl` returns 401, so keep disabled until CI has an HF token accepted for the dataset and the transcript format is smoke-validated. API listing at pinned revision shows 5,850 transcript JSONL files; README reports 5,851.
